name: Relaxing Bubble Burst
descrip: Weaken your opponent with magic, lowering their power!
outcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Lethargic Bubbles|n|[AttackerName]'s pool suddenly roils with fizzing activity, spewing countless bubbles into the air that pop delightfully as they drift closer to [TargetName], each one hinting the air with a sharp pleasant scene reminiscent of apples, and [TargetHisOrHer] muscles slowly feel more and more relaxed...
miss: [AttackerName]'s pool suddenly roils with fizzing activity, spewing countless bubbles into the air that pop delightfully as they drift closer to [TargetName], but he manages to keep away from the cloyingly drugged bubbles.
